Footer.tagline: Marketplace for in-game items and services.

PaymentModel.title: PAYMENT MODEL
PaymentModel.subtitle: How Payments Work on FoxyPlay
PaymentModel.intro:
FoxyPlay is a peer-to-peer (P2P) digital marketplace that enables users to buy and sell in-game items, gaming services, and other digital gaming assets directly with each other.

The Platform acts solely as a technical intermediary that facilitates transactions between users and maintains internal accounting of transaction balances.
PaymentModel.s2Content:
A typical transaction on FoxyPlay follows these steps:

A seller lists a digital gaming asset or service.
A buyer places an order and submits payment.
The Platform records the payment internally for the transaction.
The seller delivers the asset/service to the buyer.
The buyer confirms completion (or auto-confirmation occurs).
The amount becomes available on the seller's FoxyPlay balance.
The seller may request withdrawal according to Platform rules.

HowItWorks.title: HOW FOXYPLAY WORKS
HowItWorks.subtitle: How the Marketplace Operates
HowItWorks.intro:
FoxyPlay is an online marketplace that allows gamers to trade digital gaming assets and services with each other.

The Platform connects buyers and sellers and provides tools for listing, ordering, payment recording, and transaction management.

OperatorLegal.title: OPERATOR & LEGAL INFORMATION
OperatorLegal.subtitle: FoxyPlay Operator Details
OperatorLegal.intro:
FoxyPlay is operated by:

Country of registration: Ukraine

("Operator")
OperatorLegal.s3Content:
The Platform is operated from Ukraine.

All services are provided under Ukrainian law, unless otherwise required by applicable regulations.
OperatorLegal.s4Content:
Operator: Sole Proprietor Oleksandr Lysytsia
Country: Ukraine

Support: support@foxyplay.app

Legal: legal@foxyplay.app

Compliance: compliance@foxyplay.app
OperatorLegal.s5Content:
Use of FoxyPlay is governed by:

Terms of Service
Marketplace Disclaimer
Privacy Policy
AML & Compliance Policy
Crypto Risk Disclosure

All documents are available on the Platform.

CookieConsent.title: We use cookies
CookieConsent.description: We use cookies to improve your experience, for authentication, security, and analytics. You can customize your preferences or accept all.

Terms.title: PLATFORM TERMS OF USE
Terms.subtitle: Terms of Service (Enhanced Legal Version)
Terms.s1Content:
These Terms of Use (the "Terms") govern access to and use of the FoxyPlay online platform (the "Platform").

The Platform Operator:

Individual entrepreneur
Oleksandr Lysytsia
Country of registration: Ukraine
(the "Operator")

The Platform provides information and technical services to enable interaction between users.

Use of the Platform constitutes the User's full and unconditional acceptance of these Terms, the Marketplace Disclaimer, and other Platform policies.
Terms.s5Content:
The user's balance within the Platform is an internal accounting record reflecting the amount available for payout to the user in accordance with completed agreements.

Until actual withdrawal:

funds may be temporarily held or processed by the Operator or payment providers;
funds are not considered transferred to the user outside the Platform;
the user has only the right to request a payout in accordance with the Platform's rules.

Payout is made after:

confirmation of performance of the agreement, or
automatic expiry of the confirmation period.

Payout periods may be determined by the Platform's rules and security or compliance requirements.
Terms.s6Title: Temporary holding of funds or assets
Terms.s11Content:
The user may submit a request regarding an agreement within the Platform's time limits.

The Platform may assist in resolving the dispute but is not a party to it.

The Platform has the right to make a final decision on the dispute within the Platform.

After payout is completed, disputes are not accepted.
Terms.s14Content:
The Operator may change these Terms.

An updated version is published on the Platform.

Continued use constitutes acceptance of the changes.
Terms.s15Content: These Terms are governed by the law of Ukraine.
Terms.s16Content:
Operator: Sole proprietor O. Lysytsia
Country: Ukraine

AmlCompliance.title: AML & COMPLIANCE POLICY
AmlCompliance.subtitle: Anti-money laundering and counter-terrorism financing policy
AmlCompliance.s1Content:
This Policy sets out measures to combat money laundering (AML), counter the financing of terrorism (CTF), and other illicit financial operations on the FoxyPlay online platform (the "Platform").

The Platform Operator:

Individual entrepreneur
Oleksandr Lysytsia
Country: Ukraine
(the "Operator")

The Platform applies a risk-based approach to managing financial and compliance risks.
AmlCompliance.s13Content:
The Operator may update this Policy.

An updated version is published on the Platform.

Use of the Platform constitutes acceptance of the changes.
AmlCompliance.s14Content:
Operator: Sole proprietor O. Lysytsia
Country: Ukraine

Privacy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
Privacy.subtitle: Privacy Policy
Privacy.s1Content:
This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, process, and protect the personal data of users of the FoxyPlay online platform (the "Platform").

The owner and controller of personal data is:

Individual entrepreneur
Oleksandr Lysytsia
Country: Ukraine
(the "Operator")

The Operator processes personal data in accordance with:

EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR);
Ukrainian legislation on the protection of personal data;
AML/KYC and financial monitoring requirements (where applicable).

By using the Platform, the User agrees to this Policy.
Privacy.s2Content:
We may collect and process the following categories of data:

Registration data
• email
• login
• password (in secured form)

Contact data
• email
• messengers (if provided)

Transaction data
• transaction history
• amounts
• statuses
• transaction IDs
• crypto addresses (if applicable)

Technical data
• IP address
• device
• browser
• cookies
• access logs

Verification data (KYC)
• full name
• date of birth
• identity document
• photo/selfie
• address
• other data required for verification
Privacy.s12Content:
The Operator may change this Policy.

An updated version is published on the Platform.

Continued use constitutes acceptance of the changes.
Privacy.s13ContactLabel: For questions about personal data protection:
Privacy.s13Content:
Operator: Sole proprietor O. Lysytsia
Country: Ukraine

CryptoRisk.title: CRYPTO RISK DISCLOSURE
CryptoRisk.subtitle: Crypto asset risk warning
CryptoRisk.s1Content:
Crypto assets are high-risk digital assets with the potential for significant financial loss.

By using the FoxyPlay Platform, the User confirms that they are aware of and accept all risks associated with the use of crypto assets.
CryptoRisk.s12Content:
Operator: Sole proprietor O. Lysytsia
Country: Ukraine

CookiePolicy.title: COOKIE POLICY
CookiePolicy.subtitle: Use of cookies on the Platform
CookiePolicy.s1Content:
Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, remember your preferences, and provide information to the site owners.

Cookies can be "session" cookies (deleted when you close your browser) or "persistent" cookies (stored for a set period or until you delete them).
CookiePolicy.s2Intro: We use the following categories of cookies:
CookiePolicy.essentialDesc: Required for the Platform to function (e.g. authentication, session management, security). These cannot be disabled without affecting core functionality.
CookiePolicy.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors use the Platform (e.g. page views, sessions). This data is used to improve the service.
CookiePolicy.securityDesc: Support fraud prevention, protection against abuse, and secure authentication. Critical for payment and crypto transaction safety.
CookiePolicy.marketingDesc: May be used to deliver relevant ads or measure ad effectiveness. You can opt out of these.

Disclaimer.title: MARKETPLACE DISCLAIMER
